title: Ambientconstruction
summary: Packages powers of the ambient Laplacian as weighted operators and proves their weight shift under the algebraic calculus interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Packages powers of the ambient Laplacian as weighted operators and proves their weight shift under the algebraic calculus interface.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in GJMSoperators/Ambientconstruction.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: ambient Laplacian Power Operator. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Formal proposition: ambient Laplacian Power Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientLaplacianPowerOperator_apply (k : ℕ) (f : Function Conf) : ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf k f = CalConf.lapPow k f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Laplacian Power Operator zero apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientLaplacianPowerOperator_zero_apply (f : Function Conf) : ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf 0 f = f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Laplacian Power Operator one apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientLaplacianPowerOperator_one_apply (f : Function Conf) : ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf 1 f = CalConf.lap f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Laplacian Power maps GJMS weight. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientLaplacianPower_maps_GJMS_weight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : CalConf.MapsHomogeneousWeight (ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf k) (calculusInputWeight CalConf k) (calculusOutputWeight CalConf k)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: lap Pow maps GJMS weight. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem lapPow_maps_GJMS_weight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) {f : Function Conf} (hf : CalConf.IsXHomogeneous (calculusInputWeight CalConf k) f) : CalConf.IsXHomogeneous (calculusOutputWeight CalConf k)

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
